content.en:
One of the fighting platforms.

Ye Tian and the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor came to power, and more and more half-step domain ancestors came, and many of them were half-step domain ancestors of the One Realm.

After all, this is a battle between two powerhouses on the list of the Ten Thousand Realms, although the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor was squeezed out of the list of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, most people still recognize his strength.

Therefore, they were naturally very interested in the two powerhouses on the list of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

There were even some half-step domain ancestors who opened gambling games in private, and many people bet on the Silver Eyes Dao Ancestor to win.

Because the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor was a true genius after all, and he was also the Holy Son of the Holy Land, he hadn't been to the Battle Realm Tower for a long time, and his strength was definitely much stronger than at the beginning.

Therefore, the 1000th place on the list of the realm of all things is not necessarily his real strength.

As for Ye Tian, he didn't have any great achievements, he just defeated some of the top Ten Thousand Realm half-step domain ancestors, and he hadn't even defeated a one-step realm half-step domain ancestor.

Moreover, Ye Tian is from a small place, and there must be no strong inheritance and hole cards.

Such a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm may have been lucky enough to enter the list of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

When it comes to rankings, the list isn't necessarily accurate.

Therefore, they were not very optimistic about Ye Tian.

Soon, the battle began.

As soon as he entered the arena, the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor performed a rare Soul Forbidden Dao Technique.

I saw a flash of gray light in the eyes of the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor.

Rumble!!!!!

The soul world descended and instantly suppressed Ye Tian's soul.

If it was an ordinary half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, just this move would directly shatter the soul of the other party.

Therefore, even if the combat power is relatively rebellious, but the soul is not strong The Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor will be defeated in the hands of the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor.

However, Ye Tiannai is an Extreme Dao Inheritance, whether it is the body, soul, or forbidden power, he has reached the Extreme Dao level.

Extreme Dao represents the extreme, and therefore his soul is incomparably stronger.

Although Ye Tian was limited to inheriting knowledge and did not create a soul-type forbidden dao technique, it didn't mean that Ye Tian couldn't stop this move.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's momentum exploded, and he struck at this soul world with a blow from the Heaven Killing Spear.

He wants to tear apart the soul world with absolute power.

Rumble!!!

The soul world collided with Ye Tian's soul, and instead of tearing Ye Tian's soul in an instant, it was directly torn apart by Ye Tian's terrifying power.

Then, Ye Tian made another move.

"Broken!"

The Forbidden Dao Technique Shadow Thorn was cast.

Poof!

The blow that ignored the distance directly penetrated the body of the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor, directly hitting his physical body.

But he didn't fall directly like the other Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors, but survived.

"Hey, that's interesting!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Although he didn't make a full attack, this move was enough to kill a Unified Realm like the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, but he didn't kill the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor.

I have to say that although the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor is only a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, his strength is even stronger than that of the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master.

"It is worthy of being the Holy Lord of the Holy Land of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and his strength is even above the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, I am afraid that it is comparable to the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the One Realm like the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, and even a little more powerful in some aspects!" Ye Tian estimated.

"What a powerful attack! What a weird attack, there was no way to dodge, and it was hit directly!"

The silver-eyed Dao Ancestor was extremely dignified.

If it is in the outside world, he can use some life-saving things, and with his status, he can use those life-saving things, even if his strength is not as good as Ye Tian, the consumption is enough to consume Ye Tian.

But not in the War Tower, except for the use of a main attack weapon, other weapons and secret treasures cannot be used.

Otherwise, the blow just now wouldn't have hit him hard.

"Holy Communion is necessary!"

Silver-eyed Dao Ancestor said secretly.

Bang!!!!

Silver light burst out from the body of the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor, as if a set of silver battle armor completely enveloped him, and when he looked closely, he found that he was covered with silver scales all over his body, looking extremely gorgeous and majestic.

"Silver Gang Holy Body!"

"Oh my God, it's the Silver Gang Holy Body, I didn't expect the Silver Eyes Dao Ancestor to actually practice the Silver Gang Holy Body, this is a powerful Holy Body in the top three thousand ranks of the Dark Holy Domain!"

"It is said that it is difficult to condense a holy body like the Yingang Holy Body, the process is very dangerous, and once it fails, it is easy to be severely injured or even fall. It seems that the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor has obtained the Holy Artifact of the Silver Gang Holy Fruit. I don't know if he obtained it himself, or if he obtained it from the Swinging Sea Holy Land behind him!"

"There is no need to guess, it is the Yingang Holy Fruit obtained by the Swinging Sea Holy Land, it is said that somewhere in the Dark Forbidden Domain, the Swinging Sea Holy Land fought with many forces for the holy object of the Silver Gang Holy Fruit, and even broke out with the forbidden creatures, and finally the Swinging Sea Holy Land fell dozens of domain ancestors, including a top domain ancestor, and only then did they snatch the Silver Gang Holy Fruit!"

"The Silver Eyed Dao Ancestor is really lucky, he happens to be in the stage of being vigorously valued and cultivated, once he becomes a domain ancestor, there is no way to condense the Holy Body, and there is no way to obtain the Silver Gang Holy Fruit!"

"The Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor has condensed the Silver Gang Holy Body, I'm afraid the strength is enough to rank in the top five hundred of the list of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, no wonder he is so angry, he has such strength, but he was kicked out of the list, who is not angry?"

"This Dao Ancestor of All Things is going to be miserable!"

......

"Silver Gang Holy Body!"

This was the first time Ye Tian had seen the second person with the Holy Communion besides himself, maybe other people also had the Holy Body, but he didn't show it, and he didn't know either.

"This holy body is good, but it is far inferior to my holy body, I don't know how my mixed element holy body is in the dark holy realm?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Die!"

The Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor killed him.

And Ye Tian still didn't use the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, nor did he use the power of the Extreme Dao.

But other strengths can be exposed!

"Shadow Thorn!"

"Dark Pole Spear!"

Ye Tian burst out of strength, showing the combat power of the top Guiyi Realm half-step domain ancestor.

Rumble!!!

The Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor was directly knocked away, and the Silver Gang Holy Body began to crack.

The gap between the two sides was a bit big, and he was completely beaten by Ye Tianhang.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

Ye Tian kept making moves, and in a short time, he beat the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor to the point that his flesh was cracked.

Click!

The Silver Gang Holy Body of the Silver-Eyed Dao Ancestor was broken.

Then, Ye Tian struck another blow through and directly exploded the body of the silver-eyed Dao Ancestor.

The Dou Zhan Tai directly judged that the Silver Eyed Dao Ancestor was defeated.

Ye Tian wins!
